name: Orange Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top of each orange and scoop out the pulp with a spoon. Reserve 4 tablespoons of the juice.
2. Cut a thin slice from the bottoms of the oranges to ensure they stand straight.
3. Soften the ice cream in the refrigerator.
4. Stir in the reserved orange juice, mixing well.
5. Fill each orange with the ice cream mixture.
6. Place into the freezer.
7. Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks.
8. Add sugar and vanilla, then continue beating until the egg whites are stiff.
9. Cover the filled oranges with the meringue, sealing well.
10. Place on a baking sheet and bake at 475°F for 2 to 5 minutes or until the tops are lightly brown.
11. Serve immediately.
